_comment: Claude Code settings template — Claude Code Standards Kit by SQWR Studio
_instructions: Copy to ~/.claude/settings.json (global) or .claude/settings.json (project). Replace KIT_PATH with your kit path. See CONTRACT-TOKEN-ECONOMY for full rationale.
_model_comment: opusplan = Opus for planning/reasoning, Sonnet for execution. Haiku handles research via CLAUDE_CODE_SUBAGENT_MODEL. 68% cost reduction vs all-Opus (validated). Fallback: 'claude-opus-4-6' if Sonnet unavailable.

permissions._defaultMode_comment: bypassPermissions = no confirmation prompts. Protected paths (.git, .claude, .vscode) are always protected regardless. VS Code: set claudeCode.initialPermissionMode = 'plan' in settings.json to start in plan mode.

hooks._comment: AUDIT-DEPLOYMENT — blocks push if lint/build fails. Bypass: SQWR_SKIP_BUILD_CHECK=1
CONTRACT-SECURITY §2 — warns on unsafe HTML injection (OWASP A03: XSS)
All active contracts — warns on: excessive any types, @ts-ignore, console.log, missing img alt
CONTRACT-TOKEN-ECONOMY TE-7.1 — alerts if subagent output exceeds 800 words (two-phase research enforcement)
